compiled_state.title: As a plugin maintainer, I can see plan review and fidelity review outcomes in the event log
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Instrument REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md and brainstorm fidelity review to emit review_result events
**Why**: Plan reviews and fidelity reviews have different revision cycle patterns than code reviews — tracking them separately enables targeted optimization
**Scope**:
- IN: Emit events with review type (implementation-plan, brainstorm-fidelity, architectural), pass/fail, dimension scores, finding counts by severity, revision cycle count
- OUT: Code review instrumentation, commit workflow instrumentation

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md instructs agents to emit review_result events with all specified fields
  <- Satisfies: 'Review workflows emit structured JSONL events'
- When this story is complete, brainstorm fidelity review sections emit events with the same schema
  <- Satisfies: 'Review workflows emit structured JSONL events'
- When this story is complete, unit tests verify event emission for both review types
  <- Satisfies: unit test DoD

## Considerations

- [Testing] Event emission is prose-instructed — tests must verify events were written
- [Reliability] Push bug 7895-e2a5 may prevent remote persistence

comments.body: Story complete: all tasks closed, completion verifier PASS
comments.author: Main
